title: A Map of the City
content: When Sophia arrived in the city, the first thing she did was buy a paper map. Although she had navigation apps on her phone, she enjoyed seeing the entire city at once. Every evening, she marked the places she had visited and highlighted attractions she still wanted to explore. The map soon became covered with notes and small drawings. By the end of the trip, it looked completely different from when she purchased it. Sophia kept the map as a souvenir because it reminded her of the journey and all the places she had discovered.
